notes: v0.16.27 — RIFTS Phase 2/9. New RIFTS page in the left nav rail. 4 difficulty cards (EASY/NORMAL/HARD/BRUTAL) — click one to spend 10 energy and open a rift. 3 procedurally generated paths with weighted node types: combat / elite / mini-boss / heal / module / hazard / slipstream / strafe / final boss. Pick a path, see the run map with current node pulsing and completed nodes ticked. Carry-HP bar tracks across stops. Rift state fully persistent — survives game restarts, ABANDON button for voluntary forfeit. ENTER NODE button currently advances pointer only; actual gameplay hooks land in Phases 3-7. Windows only.
